mission.title: vllm: Support allenai/Molmo-7B VisionLM
mission.description: Add support for the Allen AI Molmo-7B-O-0924 vision-language model in vLLM. Molmo is an open multimodal model from the Allen Institute for AI that processes both text and images. Requested by 26+ users.

steps.title: Check current vLLM setup
steps.description:
Verify your vLLM version and configuration:
```bash
pip show vllm | grep Version
# or
python -c "import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)"
```
Molmo model support requires a recent version of vLLM with the Molmo model architecture registered.

steps.title: Understand the Molmo model
steps.description:
Molmo is a family of open vision-language models from Allen AI:
- [allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924) - 7B parameter model
- Part of the [Molmo collection](https://huggingface.co/collections/allenai/molmo-66f379e6fe3b8ef090a8ca19)

Molmo can process both text and image inputs, making it suitable for multimodal tasks like image captioning, visual question answering, and more.

steps.title: Serve Molmo with vLLM
steps.description:
Start the vLLM server with the Molmo model:
```bash
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924 \
  --trust-remote-code
```
The `--trust-remote-code` flag is required because Molmo uses custom model code from the HuggingFace repository.

steps.title: Verify Molmo inference works
steps.description:
Test that Molmo model serving is working with a text-only query:
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Describe the key features of a good programming language."}], "max_tokens": 100}'
```
For multimodal (image + text) queries, use the vision endpoint with base64-encoded images or image URLs.

resolution.summary: vLLM added support for the Allen AI Molmo family of vision-language models by integrating the Molmo model architecture. This enables high-throughput serving of Molmo models for both text-only and multimodal (image + text) inference tasks through vLLM's serving engine.
codeSnippets:
# Serve Molmo-7B with vLLM
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924 \
  --trust-remote-code

prerequisites.description: Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU with sufficient VRAM (16GB+ recommended), and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm).
